label: Lupine Controls
description: Control the Lupine SL Grano F from the Karoo app or the in-ride field, with ride-aware connection handling and a Lupine-specific control surface.
releaseNotes:
* Corrected BLE handling to subscribe on the Lupine notify characteristic
* Improved long-press pairing flow to continue automatically when a single lamp is found
* Added clearer pairing-mode guidance and user-friendly error messages
* Updated published install metadata for the new beta
